description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, create a band-ratio false color composite to highlight mineralogical differences using the Landsat multispectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (Band 1: SWIR1, Band 2: NIR, Band 3: Red, Band 4: Green). Create three ratio bands: ratio_fe (band_1 / band_2), ratio_clay (band_2 / band_3), and ratio_hydroxyl (band_4 / band_1). Generate an RGB composite using these bands (R=ratio_fe, G=ratio_clay, B=ratio_hydroxyl). Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/mineral_ratios.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/mineral_ratios.tif.
